# EnvGuard

Security linting for env, Docker, CI, and runtime configuration.

- README: https://github.com/bhargavmahanta/envGuard/blob/main/README.md
- SDK: https://github.com/bhargavmahanta/envGuard/blob/main/docs/sdk.md
- Agent integration: https://github.com/bhargavmahanta/envGuard/blob/main/docs/agent-integration.md
- Public API: https://github.com/bhargavmahanta/envGuard/blob/main/docs/public-api.md
- Rules: https://github.com/bhargavmahanta/envGuard/blob/main/docs/rules.md
- Reporting: https://github.com/bhargavmahanta/envGuard/blob/main/docs/reporting.md
- Configuration examples: https://github.com/bhargavmahanta/envGuard/blob/main/docs/examples.md

Use `envguard scan . --agent` for deterministic masked JSON. EnvGuard does not validate credentials or make network requests while scanning.
